source: iOS TemperatureDataTest; Android currently returns two samples for this payload

expected.migrationOwnership: Protocol-only characterization excluded from first common KMP migration because current Android/iOS behavior is platform-specific. Use this vector to make an explicit shared parser policy before promoting this behavior to common code.

notes: iOS currently decodes this compressed type-0 payload as two samples with platform-specific float bit-pattern interpretation; Android and common policy use separate vectors until shared parser ownership is decided.
